properties.displayName: [Preview]: Enforce Encryption-at-Rest with Customer Managed Keys (CMK) with Azure Key Vault Managed HSM Keys across Azure Services
properties.description: Help restrict and audit Azure Services to use CMK with Azure Key Vault Premium Managed HSM keys

metadata.description: This parameter lets you choose the effect of the policy. If you choose Audit, the policy will only audit resources for compliance. If you choose Deny (default), the policy will deny the creation of non-compliant resources. If you choose Disabled, the policy will not enforce compliance (useful, for example, as a second assignment to ignore a subset of non-compliant resources in a single resource group).

metadata.displayName: Allowed key types in Key Vault
metadata.description: The list of allowed key types in Key Vault
